message:
test(evidence): add comprehensive tests for evidence pack page

Add 666 lines of tests covering:

**Evidence Pack Validation**
- validateEvidenceRecord: type guards, required fields, relationship arrays
- validateEvidencePack: structure validation, thread_id matching
- Error handling for invalid/malformed data

**Evidence Pack Utilities**
- getEvidenceStats: counts by type, verified status, relationships
- formatAccessMethod: human-readable access method labels
- getRelationshipBadges: color-coded H/T relationship badges
- getTypeIcon: icon selection per evidence type
- getTypeLabel: human-readable type labels
- isValidEvidenceType: type guard for EvidenceType union

**Presentational Components**
- EvidenceCard: renders record with badges, excerpts, metadata
- EvidenceCardSkeleton: loading state placeholder
- EmptyEvidenceState: no-records fallback with action button
- EvidenceStats: summary statistics display
- ExcerptList: collapsible excerpt rendering with verbatim styling

All 66 tests pass. Component tests use Testing Library with
accessibility assertions (role queries, aria attributes).

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
